verdict.reasoning: Decision cannot be evaluated due to critical missing information. The proposal contains multiple redacted/placeholder fields ('????') including: pilot name/scope, business mission, and specific objectives. The Constitution is also incomplete with empty mission, values, and constraints. Without clear decision parameters, financial details, risk assessment, and alignment criteria, this decision fails basic governance requirements for constitutional compliance evaluation.
conditions: Provide complete, unredacted pilot name and scope
Clarify specific business mission and pilot objectives
Supply detailed budget breakdown within $5,000 constraint
Define measurable success criteria and timeline
Complete Constitution with mission, values, and constraints
Specify which business values (quality/transparency/growth) this pilot advances
Identify and document all legal/ethical/compliance considerations
Provide risk assessment aligned with 'moderate' risk appetite
alternatives: Resubmit decision with complete information for full evaluation
Escalate to founder for guidance on redacted proposal elements
Conduct discovery phase to define pilot scope before board review
Request clarification from 'wizard' source on missing context
